description: Resource Type definition for AWS::BedrockAgentCore::OnlineEvaluationConfig - Creates an online evaluation configuration for continuous monitoring of agent performance.

DataSourceConfig.description: The configuration that specifies where to read agent traces for online evaluation.

CloudWatchLogsInputConfig.description: The configuration for reading agent traces from CloudWatch logs.

LogGroupNames.description: The list of CloudWatch log group names to monitor for agent traces.

ServiceNames.description: The list of service names to filter traces within the specified log groups.

EvaluatorReference.description: The reference to an evaluator used in online evaluation configurations.

EvaluatorId.description: The unique identifier of the evaluator.

Rule.description: The evaluation rule that defines sampling configuration, filtering criteria, and session detection settings.

Filters.description: The list of filters that determine which agent traces should be included in the evaluation.

SamplingConfig.description: The configuration that controls what percentage of agent traces are sampled for evaluation.

SamplingPercentage.description: The percentage of agent traces to sample for evaluation.

Filter.description: The filter that applies conditions to agent traces during online evaluation.

Key.description: The key or field name to filter on within the agent trace data.

Operator.description: The comparison operator to use for filtering.

FilterValue.description: The value used in filter comparisons.

StringValue.description: The string value for text-based filtering.

DoubleValue.description: The numeric value for numerical filtering.

BooleanValue.description: The boolean value for true/false filtering conditions.

SessionConfig.description: The configuration that defines how agent sessions are detected.

SessionTimeoutMinutes.description: The number of minutes of inactivity after which an agent session is considered complete.

OutputConfig.description: The configuration that specifies where evaluation results should be written.

CloudWatchOutputConfig.description: The CloudWatch configuration for writing evaluation results.

LogGroupName.description: The CloudWatch log group name for evaluation results.

OnlineEvaluationConfigId.description: The unique identifier of the online evaluation configuration.

OnlineEvaluationConfigArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the online evaluation configuration.

OnlineEvaluationConfigName.description: The name of the online evaluation configuration. Must be unique within your account.

Description.description: The description of the online evaluation configuration.

DataSourceConfig.description: The data source configuration that specifies CloudWatch log groups and service names to monitor.

EvaluationExecutionRoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM role that grants permissions for evaluation.

Evaluators.description: The list of evaluators to apply during online evaluation.

Rule.description: The evaluation rule that defines sampling configuration, filters, and session detection settings.

Status.description: The status of the online evaluation configuration.

ExecutionStatus.description: The execution status indicating whether the online evaluation is currently running.

OutputConfig.description: The configuration that specifies where evaluation results should be written.

CreatedAt.description: The timestamp when the online evaluation configuration was created.

UpdatedAt.description: The timestamp when the online evaluation configuration was last updated.

Tags.description: A list of tags to assign to the online evaluation configuration.
